overall.description: GTA V gameplay footage showing a character walking and running along the Del Perro beach promenade at sunset. The character moves past colorful beach houses and pedestrians with the amusement pier visible in the distance, then turns around to walk back as the sky displays vibrant orange and purple sunset hues.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront parking area with real estate signage

events.description: character begins walking forward from the parked jeep along the promenade
passing the for sale sign and entering the residential beachfront walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past the parked jeep and real estate sign, heading toward the beachfront

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt and plaid shorts walking toward the camera

entered.detail: vintage green and cream jeep parked by the curb with chrome details
green and yellow foreclosure sign with geometric house logo and phone number
multi-story gray apartment building with wooden balconies and lattice fencing
pink single-story house with red tile roof and green window shutters

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a static view of a green jeep parked next to a For Sale sign. The character starts walking along a narrow beachfront path with the gray apartment building on the left and the ocean visible to the right. A pedestrian in a white shirt approaches from the opposite direction as the character passes the real estate signage and enters the residential promenade area.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential beachfront promenade with colorful stucco houses

agents.ego_description: walking at a steady pace along the promenade passing beach houses and occasional pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking along the beach wall away from the camera

entered.detail: yellow stucco building with white tile base and wooden balcony railings
orange building with wooden pergola and decorative stone columns
amusement pier with ferris wheel and roller coaster visible in the distance
ornate black lamppost with multiple globe lights lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the open promenade with full sky visibility and warm sunset backlighting. Colorful beach houses in yellow and orange line the left side while the Del Perro pier becomes visible in the distance. Palm trees and ornate street lamps dot the walkway as the character passes pedestrians moving in various directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beachfront approaching the amusement pier

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the promenade toward the pier

agents.ego_description: running along the beachfront path toward the pier, overtaking other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in black vest and khaki shorts running ahead along the path

entered.detail: sandy beach area between the walkway and the ocean water
small white lifeguard station on the beach
white regulatory sign on metal pole along the beach path

segments.scene_description: The character breaks into a run along the wide-open beachfront path. The sandy beach is now visible on the right side with a lifeguard tower in the distance. The Del Perro pier appears larger on the left as the character runs past other pedestrians, with the sunset creating a warm orange glow across the ocean and sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beachfront with sunset ocean view

events.description: character stops running, turns around 180 degrees, and begins walking back toward the starting point

agents.ego_description: turned around to face the sunset and walking back along the beachfront, now with the ocean on the left

notable_agents.action: man in striped shirt and green pants walking toward the camera

entered.detail: green wooden bench facing the ocean for spectators
blue recycling bin next to the trash can

segments.scene_description: After reaching a point near the pier, the character turns around and begins walking back. The perspective shifts to face the vibrant sunset over the ocean, which is now on the left side. The character passes benches and trash receptacles while other pedestrians walk toward them, with the Del Perro pier now visible ahead in the distance.

events.description: approaching the area with blue construction barriers and denser pedestrian traffic near the buildings

agents.ego_description: walking back along the path passing the blue construction barrier and groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in gray shirt and shorts walking toward the camera

entered.detail: temporary bright blue construction fencing blocking off an area on the left side
dense group of palm trees lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking back toward the starting area, passing a prominent blue construction barrier on the left. The path becomes more enclosed with palm trees lining the right side and more pedestrians visible. The Del Perro pier remains visible in the distance to the left as the character approaches the denser residential area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a beachfront promenade that transitions from a quiet residential path into a vibrant, sunset-lit coastal walk. It begins beside a green jeep and a real estate sign, moving past a gray apartment building as a pedestrian in a white shirt approaches. As the path opens into the residential promenade, the lighting shifts to a warm sunset glow, illuminating colorful yellow and orange beach houses and ornate street lamps before the Del Perro pier emerges in the distance. The camera then accelerates as the character breaks into a run along the wide beachfront, passing a lifeguard tower under an orange sky, before turning around to face the vibrant sunset over the ocean. Finally, the perspective shifts back toward the starting area, passing blue construction barriers and palm trees as the scene returns to the denser residential surroundings.
